output:
The box.

Emma has no information about the key being moved. She was at the elephant information board (far from the office) when George took the key to the office, and she was putting her sunglasses away under the trees when David was in the reptile house. She never witnessed either transfer. From her perspective, the key would still be in its original/default location — the box — which is also where it actually ends up after David returns it.
